title: Two men arrested in Gujarat for break-in at commercial complex in Flower Bazaar
fullText: Two men were arrested in Gujarat for breaking in and stealing cash in six shops at a commercial complex in Flower Bazaar. Police said Rameshkumar Jain, 55, a resident of Flower Bazaar, runs a cosmetics shop on Reddy Ram Street in the locality. On January 25, he locked his shop in the afternoon and returned home. When he reopened it the next morning, he found that the shutter lock had been broken and ₹1.30 lakh kept in the cash box had been stolen. Published - March 04, 2026 01:16 am IST
